office_info.name: SmileCare Dental
office_info.emergency_info: 24/7 emergency line available for existing patients with severe pain
office_info.parking: Free parking available in the building lot. Street parking also available.

insurance.note: Always confirm with patient's specific plan as coverage varies

faqs.question: How often should I get a cleaning?
faqs.answer: Every 6 months for most patients. Every 3–4 months for patients with gum disease.

faqs.question: Do you see children?
faqs.answer: Yes, all ages. First visit recommended when first tooth appears or by age one.

faqs.question: Is whitening safe?
faqs.answer: Yes when done professionally. Some temporary sensitivity is normal and expected.

faqs.question: What if I have dental anxiety?
faqs.answer: Very common. We offer nitrous oxide sedation, can take breaks, use hand signals. Please let us know and we will make you comfortable.

faqs.question: How long do fillings last?
faqs.answer: Composite fillings 7–10 years. Silver amalgam 10–15 years.

faqs.question: Do I need to arrive early for my first visit?
faqs.answer: Yes, please arrive 15 minutes early to complete new patient paperwork. You can also fill it out online beforehand.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, HSA/FSA cards, cash, and CareCredit financing.

faqs.question: What should I do if I have a dental emergency after hours?
faqs.answer: Call our main number — you will be connected to our 24/7 emergency line for existing patients with severe pain.
